_comment: Injectable rule docs manifest. Used by syncRuleDocs() to drive optional rule file deployment from the filid-setup skill. Never read by SessionStart hooks.

rules.title: FCA-AI Architecture Rules
rules.description: Fractal Context Architecture rules: node types, structural rules, documentation constraints, and quality thresholds. Mandatory for every FCA-AI project.

rules.title: Reuse-First Implementation Rules
rules.description: Implementation guidance for FCA-AI projects: solution selection priority, safe extension, file authoring, and naming heuristics.

rules.title: Cognitive Discipline Rules
rules.description: Epistemic standards that block LLM rationalization: evidence over confidence, anti-rationalization principles, and intellectual honesty requirements.
